name: Conjuration
summary: The conjurer focuses on the study of summoning monsters and magic alike to bend to his will.

granted_power_l1_passive.name: Summoner's Charm
granted_power_l1_passive.summary: Whenever you cast a conjuration (summoning) spell, increase the duration by a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your wizard level (minimum 1). This increase is not doubled by Extend Spell. At 20th level, you can change the duration of all summon monster spells to permanent.

granted_power_l1_active.name: Acid Dart
granted_power_l1_active.summary: As a standard action you can unleash an acid dart targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The acid dart deals 1d6 points of acid damage + 1 for every two wizard levels you possess. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier. This attack ignores spell resistance.

higher_level_powers.summary: Teleport up to 30 ft per wizard level per day in 5-ft increments, no AoO.
